steps.title: Track the units
steps.content: The rate is $1{,}800$ meters per hour per second. Convert meters to feet, then convert the hour in the denominator to seconds.

steps.title: Apply both conversions
steps.content:
Use $1$ meter equals $3.28$ feet and $1$ hour equals $3{,}600$ seconds:
$$1{,}800\cdot\frac{3.28\ \text{ft}}{1\ \text{m}}\cdot\frac{1\ \text{h}}{3{,}600\ \text{s}}$$
$$=\frac{1{,}800\cdot3.28}{3{,}600}$$
$$=1.64$$

steps.title: Choose the closest value
steps.content: The converted rate is about $1.64$ feet per second squared, so the closest listed value is $1.64$. The answer is B.
